SEARCH
Package com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend

Class AdminMovieListUI

java.lang.Object
com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.AdminMovieListUI
public class AdminMovieListUI extends Object
The main administration screen of the Ketchup application. Displays all movie screening records loaded from MovieRepository in a tabular format, and provides controls for searching, sorting, adding, editing, and deleting movies. Changes made during the session are persisted to MOVIES.csv and USER_CREDENTIALS.csv on logout or when the window is closed.

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public static void initialize(String username)
      Creates a new AdminMovieListUI instance, configures it with the given admin username, and makes the main window visible.
      Parameters:
      username - the display name of the logged-in administrator, shown in the top-right welcome label

    • addMovieRow

      public static void addMovieRow(Movie m)
      Adds the given Movie to currentData and appends a corresponding row to the table. Called by AdminMovieFormUI after a new movie is successfully created in "ADD" mode.
      Parameters:
      m - the newly created Movie to add to the table

    • getAdminMovieListUI

      public static AdminMovieListUI getAdminMovieListUI()
      Returns the current singleton instance of AdminMovieListUI. Used by other classes to obtain a parent component reference for dialog centering and error display.
      Returns:
      the active AdminMovieListUI instance

    • getMainFrame

      public JFrame getMainFrame()
      Returns the main JFrame of the admin screen. Used as a parent component for dialogs spawned from other UI classes.
      Returns:
      the main admin JFrame
